nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: BLE peripheral module providing platform abstraction and configuration for cross-platform BLE advertising. Defines PeripheralConfig for service/characteristic UUIDs and BlePeripheral trait with platform-specific implementations.

nodes.name: peripheral_linux.rs
nodes.summary: Linux BLE peripheral implementation using BlueZ via bluetooth crate. Provides async GATT server with RX characteristic for write requests and TX characteristic for notifications.

nodes.name: peripheral_macos.rs
nodes.summary: macOS BLE peripheral implementation using CoreBluetooth via objc2 framework. Provides GATT server with RX/TX characteristics, dispatch queue integration, and overflow-safe notification queuing.

nodes.name: peripheral_stub.rs
nodes.summary: Stub BLE peripheral implementation for unsupported platforms, returning errors for all operations.

nodes.name: peripheral_windows.rs
nodes.summary: Windows BLE peripheral implementation using Windows.Networking.Bluetooth namespace via windows-rs crate. Provides GATT server with RX/TX characteristics.

nodes.name: ble_central.rs
nodes.summary: BLE central role implementation for scanning and connecting to peripherals. Manages adapter, active peripheral connection, and notification stream using blesc crate.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Main native module implementing cross-device calculator sync with BLE transport, SQLite persistence, keychain identity, and JWS/JWE cryptographic signing. Entry point for napi-rs exports.

nodes.name: browser-calculator.ts
nodes.summary: In-memory browser implementation of the calculator API for development/testing. Provides BLE session simulation without native dependencies.

nodes.name: log-store.ts
nodes.summary: Immutable log storage implementation using React's external store pattern. Provides a LogStore class with push, clear, toText methods and subscribe/getSnapshot for React integration.

nodes.name: logging-calculator-api.ts
nodes.summary: Logging middleware wrapper for calculator API calls. Wraps any calculator API implementation to log method invocations, results, timing, and diagnostics.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Main React renderer entry point implementing the calculator UI with BLE networking. Provides host/guest role selection, room discovery, peer connection management, and calculation input with history.

nodes.name: expression.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the expression calculator utility. Validates arithmetic expression parsing and calculation correctness.

nodes.name: expression.ts
nodes.summary: Safe arithmetic expression evaluator supporting addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and modulo operations. Parses infix expressions and returns formatted decimal results.

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Electron main process entry point that registers IPC handlers for calculator operations and creates the application window with sandbox configuration.

nodes.name: native-calculator.ts
nodes.summary: Loads the native Rust napi-rs BLE calculator module with runtime type validation, falling back to a mock implementation for development environments.

nodes.name: preload.ts
nodes.summary: Electron preload script that exposes the calculator API to the renderer process via contextBridge, mapping all IPC channel invocations.

nodes.name: global.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript global declaration that extends the Window interface with the calculator API exposed by the preload script.

nodes.name: calculator-api.ts
nodes.summary: Shared TypeScript types and IPC channel names defining the calculator API contract between Electron main and renderer processes.

nodes.name: release.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds native installers for macOS, Linux, and Windows platforms in parallel and publishes GitHub releases on version tags.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main project documentation covering the BLE Calculator Desktop Electron app architecture, commands, visual UI pass workflow, and native Rust module status.

nodes.name: electron-builder.yml
nodes.summary: Electron Builder configuration for packaging the Evolve Calc desktop app, defining app metadata, file inclusion patterns, and platform-specific targets.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point for the Electron renderer process with strict Content Security Policy, mounting the React app root.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: NPM package configuration for the BLE Calculator Desktop app, defining dependencies, dev tooling, and build scripts.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration with strict mode enabled, targeting ES2022 with NodeNext module resolution.

nodes.name: calculator-architecture.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive architecture document covering the Electron+React+Rust calculator app, including runtime architecture, UI behavior, native module boundaries, BLE roles, and security boundaries.

nodes.name: developer-onboarding.md
nodes.summary: Concise developer onboarding guide providing the shortest path for new developers to understand the calculator app, with read-first document pointers and main code paths.

nodes.name: runtime-native-and-security.md
nodes.summary: Technical deep-dive on Electron security settings, IPC channels, native adapter loading, Rust scaffold, and cross-platform BLE peripheral backends.

nodes.name: ui-layout-and-visual-pass.md
nodes.summary: UI layout documentation explaining the grid-based layout model, fixed calculator dimensions, and automated screenshot testing via Chrome DevTools Protocol.

nodes.name: browser-visual-ui-pass.mjs
nodes.summary: Visual regression testing script that launches Chrome with CDP, captures screenshots, applies scenario scripts, and computes element overlap metrics.

nodes.name: build-native-optional.mjs
nodes.summary: Conditional native module build script that only runs cargo build if the .node artifact is missing.

nodes.name: build-native.mjs
nodes.summary: Native module build script that invokes cargo with napi-rs to compile the Rust core into a Node.js addon.

nodes.name: package-platforms.mjs
nodes.summary: Cross-platform packaging orchestrator that builds native modules for multiple targets, runs electron-builder, and manages Rust toolchain installation per target.

nodes.name: styles.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet for the renderer UI defining layout, typography, and component styles.

nodes.name: vite.config.mts
nodes.summary: Vite configuration for the renderer dev server with React plugin, custom root, and strict port binding.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Rust package configuration defining the napi-rs native module with platform-specific BLE dependencies.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Rust build script that invokes napi-build to configure the napi-rs native module compilation.
